  "findings": [
    "Missing sediment trap (drip leg) upstream of the gas control valve/appliance connection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a compliant sediment trap downstream of the appliance shutoff valve, as close to the inlet of the equipment as practical, before final inspection and commissioning."
  ],
  "rationale": "Both the International Fuel Gas Code (IFGC) and NFPA 54 require a sediment trap to be installed downstream of the appliance shutoff valve, as close to the inlet of the appliance as practical, to prevent moisture, scale, and debris from entering and damaging the gas control valve.",
  "references": [
    "IFGC Section 408.4",
    "NFPA 54 Section 9.6.7"
  ]
}
